title: dryopteris blanfordii subsp. blanfordii
intro: Dryopteris blanfordii subsp. blanfordii, also known as Blanford's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include the reduction of inflammation and pain, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and improve respiratory function. The herbal preparations of Blanford's fern include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to create medicinal teas, creams, and salves for topical application.
